[A] Do you have a train leaving on Sunday?
[B] Thre are many. Where and when would you like to travel?
[A] I want to go to Bishops Stratford and arrive by 8:15 in the evening, could you tell me the train options?
[B] Do you want to arrive by 08:15 (morning) or 20:15 (evening)?
[A] Arrival by 20:15 in the evening.
[B] I have a train leaving cambridge and arriving at bishops stortford by 20:07 will that train work?
[A] Yes. I'm a big museum fan so now please find me a museum to visit in the Centre
[B] Certainly! But first, did you want to secure passage on the TR6072, departing at 19:29 and arriving at 20:07?
[A] Yes that would be great. I am also looking for a museum to visit. Could you provide the entrance fee and phone number?
[B] how many tickets do you need for the train?
[A] Just one ticket is fine. Now can you tell me about the museum?
[B] Okay I've booked your train. Reference : OVNR0IHT . And, I have lots of museums in the centre. Do you need free admissoin?
[A] Pick any and it does not matter. Please give me the fee cost and phone number once booked.
[B] I suggest Castle Galleries. It has a free entrance fee and the contact number is 01223307402.
[A] Thank you so much!
[B] Is there anything else I can help you with today?
[A] No that is it. Thank you.
[B] Well thank you for contacting the cambridge towninfo centre and have a wonderful day!

[A] Hello, I am going to be visiting Cambridge and am looking for a particular hotel called the Warkworth House.
[B] The Warkworth house is a guesthouse on the east side located at warkworth terrace. Their phone number is 01223363682. Would you like help with anything else?
[A] Perfect I would like to book it for 7 people
[B] What nights would you like me to book it for?
[A] We will arrive on Saturday and stay for four nights.
[B] The booking was successful and your reference number is D786QB5S .
[A] I also need a place to go. In the center, to do multiple sports
[B] Unfortunately there are no sports attractions in the centre of town. Should I broaden your search?
[A] How about a college instead?
[B] I have 13 colleges. Would you like more info on any of them?
[A] Surprise me, please. I just need their address, phone number, and entrance fee.
[B] Gonville and Caius College is in centre. Phone is 01223332400. It's free to get in, and the address is trinity street. Do you need anything else?
[A] No thank you that is all I needed.
[B] Great. Thanks for letting us assist you today!

[A] I'm looking for the information on a restaurant named Rajmahal, could you provide me their info?
[B] Sure. Their phone is 01223244955, postcode cb58rg, and address is 7 Barnwell Road Fen Ditton. Is there anything else I can help with?
[A] Can you book a table for 7 at 17:15 this Saturday?
[B] Yes I have you booked for 7 people and your reference number is 1U0TF4XA .
[A] Wonderful, thanks. That's all I need.
[B] You're welcome. Have a great day!

[A] I'm looking for cheap food in the centre.
[B] Sure I have Asian and Chinese restaurants and other options. Is there a type of food you are looking for?
[A] I think I'd like French food please.
[B] I'm sorry there are no cheap French restaurants in the central area.
[A] What about an Indian restaurant?
[B] There are 3 cheap Indian restaurants located in the centre. I would recommend the Kohinoor. Would you like to book a table?
[A] Great yes please book me a table there for 4 people at 11:00 on tuesday.
[B] I have reserved your table for 4. Your reference number is SSVF0E1R . Can I assist you with anything else today?
[A] That will be all. Thank you very much.
[B] You are welcome. Have a nice day.

[A] I need to book a taxi to take me from Mumford Theatre to go to Darry's Cookhouse and Wine Shop.
[B] Ok, what time do you want to leave?
[A] I need to get there by 24:45.
[B] Your booking is complte, a grey lexus will pick you up. The contact number is 07486674737. Do you need any further assistance?
[A] That was everything. Thanks!!
[B] You are quite welcome. Thanks for using our services.

[A] I need a restaurant that serves Thai food, that is expensive and is in Cambridge please
[B] Bangkok City is located at 24 Green Street City Centre. Their number is 01223354382
[A] That sounds perfect. Can you make a reservation for me for 7 people at 3:15 pm on Sunday? I need the reference number, as well.
[B] I was able to reserve that for you. Your reference number is 3CZFPQPV . Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] Yes, I also need a place to stay. Same price range as the restaurant and in the centre of town, please.
[B] ok i found 2 hotels in that area gonville hotel and university arms hotel which one would you like
[A] Can I get one that has free parking?
[B] Both offer free parking. The University Arms Hotel has 4 stars. Would you like me to book that for you?
[A] Tell me what hotel type it is?
[B] Both of them are in the same category of "Hotel"
[A] Thanks, I would also like a taxi. I'll need one from the hotel to make it to my dinner reservation.
[B] I booked a car for you, it's a white honda, the contact number is 07776292730. Did you want me to book you at the University Arms, or just the information?
[A] No thanks. I can book it myself later on. Thank you for all your help. Have a good day. Bye.
[B] Have a great day!

[A] i need a place to dine in Cambridge with expensive gastropub food
[B] We have three places, two in the center and one in the east, would you like more info or a booking on any of those?
[A] i want one in the centre
[B] The Backstreet Bistro would be an excellent choice. It's at 2 Sturton Street City Centre. I will book a table for you if you provide the party details.
[A] book a table for 4 people at 12:00 on tuesday.
[B] Reference number is : 65FUI2BA . May I assist you with anything else ?
[A] Thank you. Can you help me find a nightclub also in the city Centre?
[B] I found some night club in the center of town. Do you have preference for entrance fee?
[A] Not really just close to the restaurant. Can you give me the address of the one you recommend?
[B] its ok here is the address code V91275-45 thanks alot

[A] I need a train to London Kings Cross on Wednesday.
[B] I can help with that. Where are you departing from?
[A] I will be departing from Cambridge, and need to arrive by 08:30
[B] The TR1058 Leaves Cambridge at 7:00 and gets into London Kings Cross at 7:51. The cost is 23.60. Would you like to book it?
[A] That won't be necessary, thanks for your help.
[B] Is there anything else you need today?
[A] Yes, I would like to see an attraction in the centre of town.
[B] We have many fine attractions in the center of town. Do you have a specific type in mind?
[A] Yes, please. Multiple sports would be great. If not, theatre is my second choice.
[B] There are no multiple sports places, might i recommend mumford theatre?
[A] No thank you that will be all
[B] I have more theatre attractions if you're interested.
[A] Yes please, can I have the names of some other theater attractions?
[B] Does the Cambrdige Corn Exchange theatre in the center pique your interest?
[A] That sounds interesting! Can I have their address, entrance fee, and phone number?
[B] we are unsure of their entrance fee but their address is wheeler street and phone number is 01223357851
[A] Great that's all I needed. Thanks for your assistance.
[B] Thank you for using the Cambridge TownInfo centre. Goodbye.

[A] I need info on attractions in the center of the town.
[B] What type of attraction are you looking to attend?
[A] I'm not sure. Can you recommend one for me?
[B] I recommend old school architecture. it is located in trinity lane. can i give you the address?
[A] Yes I would like the ostcode and phone number as well. Can you find a me a train departing cambridge on wednesday?
[B] Old Schools, Trinity Lane, cb21tt. The phone number is 01223332320. As for the train, which station will you be traveling to?
[A] I am going to Kings Lynn.
[B] I will book it for you,is there anything else I can do for you ?

[A] I am looking for a hotel called a and b guest house.
[B] That guest house is moderately priced and located in the east. Would you like to make a reservation?
[A] Do they provide free parking and internet?
[B] They have free internet offered but not parking.
[A] That's fine I guess. I need to reserve a table at an expensive restaurant in the centre part of town, can you help me?
[B] I show 33 expensive restaurants in the Centre area of town. Before we narrow down your restaurant selection, let's complete your reservation with A and B Guesthouse.
[A] can i please get the address, postcode, and food type
[B] Ok, I can book you at Bedouin - address is 100 Mill Rd City Centre, CB12BD and they serve African food.
[A] Thank you that is all I needed today.
[B] You're quite welcome, have a wonderful time in Cambridge!

[A] I'm looking for a cheap restaurant in the centre.
[B] I have 15 different restaurants matching your preferences, would you like a specific type of food?
[A] No, any one will be fine. Will you pick one and send me the phone number and postcode?
[B] The phone number to J restaurant is 01223307581.
[A] Thank you! I'm actually looking for places to go in town, some type of entertainment.
[B] How about nusha? It's in the south.
[A] That sounds great. Can i get the postcode and is there a entrance fee?
[B] I don't have any information on the entrance fee, but their postcode is cb17dy. Can I help you with anything else?
[A] Yes, I need a taxi to get from the restaurant to Nusha.
[B] Okay, what time would you like to arrive in Nusha?
[A] No, I need a taxi from Nusha to the restaurant.
[B] Okay, what time do you need the taxi for?
[A] it should leave by 08:15
[B] I booked you a grey audi from nusha to j restaurant, to pick you up at 8:15. Contact number is 07366723589. Is there anything else I can do?
[A] No, thank you. That's all I need today.
[B] I hope you have a great stay. Goodbye.

[A] I'd like to visit a museum in town. What can you suggest?
[B] What area would you like to go to?
[A] I have no preferences for area, can you just suggest a couple?
[B] The cambridge contemporary art museum, and the scott polar museum are both free and in the centre.
[A] Can you give me the address for the scott polar museum?
[B] Sure! The address is lensfield road. Will that be all?
[A] That's all the help I need today. Thanks for the help.
[B] You're welcome, thank you for calling the Cambridge TownInfo centre. Have a great day.

[A] I am looking for a moderately priced restaurant in the west part of town.
[B] Meghna is an Indian restaurant, it is in the moderate price range, and it is in the west part of town. Would you like the phone number?
[A] yes, and the address and postcode please.
[B] The phone number for meghna is 01223 727410 and they are located at 205 Victoria Road Chesterton. The postcode is C.B 4, 3 L.F.
[A] Perfect. Thanks for the information. Goodbye.
[B] Thank you for choosing our system. Good bye

[A] I need a place to eat with a moderate price.
[B] Sure. Do you have any preferences as far as area of the city or cuisine type?
[A] I really need it to be moderate in price and located in Centre please.
[B] There are 21 moderately priced restaurants in the centre. Would British food interest you?
[A] Yes, if you could get me the phone number and postcode, that would be nice.
[B] Restaurant one seven postcode is cb21ab and phone is 01223337766. Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] Yes, I'm also still looking for a hotel. Some kind of guesthouse, maybe? Although I do need access to parking and wifi.
[B] Alexander Bed and Breakfast is in the centre near the restaurant, it is 4 stars and in the cheap price range. They offer both internet and wifi.
[A] that's cool, but how about something more moderately priced?
[B] There is nothing matching that criteria in the moderate price range in the centre. Is it possible to modify your criteria?
[A] The guest house does not need to be in the centre. Which part part of my criteria needs to be modified?
[B] How about acorn guest house? It's in the north.
[A] That sounds good, can I get a room for 4 people for 2 nights starting friday?
[B] Okay, here we go. The Booking was successful. The reference number is RRET7JGM . Will that be all?
[A] Yes thank you, thats all I need today.
[B] You're welcome. Have a wonderful trip.

[A] Hi, I am planning a trip to Cambridge soon and could use some help with a train.
[B] Sure, I can help you with that. Where are you departing from?
[A] I will be departing from Ely.
[B] I have 70 trains departing from Ely to Cambridge, what day are you planning to travel on?
[A] Leaving on Monday after 9:15. I would like a booking for 3 people and the reference number as well.
[B] There is a 9:35 that arrives at 9:52. How does that sound?
[A] That sounds great! I need to book that for three people.
[B] Your reference number for TR2987 is 8QYPSGFH . Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] Could you also look up the hotel called Hobsons House?
[B] Yes, the Hobsons House is a guesthouse in the west area. It's moderate in price with three stars. Would you like to make a booking?

[A] I'm looking for a place to stay that is moderately priced and includes free wifi.
[B] Did you want a guesthouse or a hotel. Maybe you need a certain area of town?
[A] Either would work for me. Just a decent room is all I really need. I'm going to be at a business conference in the north so maybe in that area.
[B] I think the ashley Hotel best suites your needs, would you like me to book a room?
[A] Yes please. I'll need a room for 7 people and 3 nights starting on Monday.
[B] Okay, your booking was successful. The reference number is : BBO5NVNF . Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] thank you for helping
[B] You are so welcome. Is there anything else I may assist you with today?
[A] Yes, I need a train on Tuesday from Cambridge.
[B] Is there a specific time and destination you are traveling to?
[A] i need to get to kings lynn. i want to leave after 20:45
[B] There is a train that leaves at 21:00.
[A] That sounds good. What is the arrival time and train ID? I'll also need the price of the ticket.
[B] TR8387 Will arrive at 21:58. 9.80 pounds.
[A] Thanks for the information. I believe I have everything I need.
[B] Okay glad I could help.

[A] I will be in Cambridge during Bastille day, can you help me find a French themed restaurant in the centre?
[B] Sure, there is a place called Cote there. Would you like me to book you a table?
[A] Yes, please for 3 people on Tuesday
[B] What time will you be coming in?
[A] 18:00 on tuesday.
[B] I have made your reservation for Tuesday at 18:00 for 3 at Cote restaurant. Your reference number is YV2SMH6M .

[A] Are there any entertainment attractions in the centre of the city?
[B] There are 44. Is there a certain type you prefer?
[A] How about a museum?
[B] I would recommend castle galleries.
[A] Yes, I would like that place. Can you give me the phone number, entrance fee, and address?
[B] Castle Galleries is located at unite su43, grande arcade, saint andrews street, 01223307402 and it is free. Can I help you with anything else?
[A] Yes can you find a restaurant for me to eat at?
[B] What type of restaurant are you looking for?
[A] I don't need to find a restaurant actually. I instead need a place to stay.
[B] Do you need a hotel or guesthouse ?
[A] Preferably a hotel if possible.
[B] To help narrow down the results, what area or price range are you looking for?
[A] Actually, type does not matter. But I want somewhere with 4 stars and wifi in the south please
[B] The aylesbray lodge guest house is a great place to stay. Shall i book it for you ?
[A] Does the hotel have free parking?
[B] Yes, it has free parking
[A] Great, can you get me the postcode, phone number and price range?
[B] Yes, the postcode is cb17sr. The phone number is 01223240089 and its moderately priced.
[A] As long as it has 4 stars, that is all I need today, thanks for your help.
[B] Yes it does have 4 stars. Enjoy your travels!
[A] Thank you, goodbye!
[B] Good bye have a nice stay.

[A] I'm looking to book a place to stay while in town. I want the hotel to be fairly expensive and near the centre. Can you give some suggestions?
[B] I have 2 wonderful hotels in that area. Both offer free internet and parking. I have the Gonville Hotel and the University Arms Hotel. How do these sound?
[A] Is one of them a guesthouse?
[B] No, they are both hotel types.
[A] I really need a guesthouse can you find one for me please?
[B] Would you like me to try to search in a different area for a guesthouse for you?
[A] No, I'd like one in the centre. I could change it to a cheaper price though.
[B] There is none under that criteria,do you want to try a different area

[A] Hi! I need a train to London Liverpool Street. I need an early one, arriving there by 8:30.
[B] I have 14 trains that will arrive before that time, is there a particular day you'd like?
[A] I would like to leave on Wednesday.
[B] I have no trains leaving at that time on Wednesday. Could you pick a different time or date?
[A] You have no trains departing Cambridge to london liverpool street on Wednesday that will arrive by 8:30?
[B] Oh wait I have found you one that departs at 5:59 and arrives in London at 7:27. would that do? Everything else is later.
[A] Yes that is fine. How long is the journey and how much is the ticket by the way?
[B] It will be 88 minutes and the price is 16.60 pounds. Shall I book a ticket?
[A] Yes book me a ticket please.
[B] No problem, your ticket is booked. The reference number is 69URTU8A .
[A] Thank you, that's all I needed today.
[B] Great! Have a wonderful time! Goodbye!

[A] I am looking for a train to cambridge leaving on Sunday.
[B] May I please have where you are departing from?
[A] I am departing from Leicester and need to leave after 8:45.
[B] Two trains leave after 8:45, TR1079 leaves at 9:09 and arrives at 10:54, and TR1744 leaves at 10:09 and arrives at 11:54, there are also 3 other trains that leave later.
[A] Great I'll take TR1079 for two people please give me the reference number.
[B] Great, your reservation is booked, your reference number is N7MG5RD7 and the total cost is 60.48 GBP
[A] Great. I'm also looking to book that for two people. Also, I'm interested in places around town. Any parks in the south area?
[B] There are 2 parks in the south area. Both are free.
[A] Can I get the phone numbers for both please?
[B] Absolutely you can! Sheep's Green and Lammas Land Park Fen Causeway can be reached at 01223302580 and you can dial 01223243830 to get in touch with Wandlebury Country Park.
[A] Can I please get the entrance fee for the Lammas Land Park?
[B] The entrance fee is free. Can I help you with anything else?
[A] No, that's all. You've been very helpful! Thank you.
[B] You are most welcome please let us know if we can help you in the future.

[A] I need an expensive restaurant in west Cambridge.
[B] We have several to choose from. Did you have a specific cuisine in mind?
[A] I want Indian food.
[B] I have 5 restaurants that match what you're looking for. Would you like to try Tandoori Palace? Its located at 68 Histon Road Chesteron.
[A] Sure, can I get a reservation for Sunday at 16:15? I will need a table for 3.
[B] I will book that for you. Would you like the phone number in case you change your mind?
[A] No I just need the reference number for the reservation for 3 people on Sunday at 16:15.
[B] Sure. The reference number is CBAGG03S and your table will be reserved for 15 minutes. Is there anything else today?
[A] I would like a place to stay
[B] There are 33 options for lodging in town. Do you have a preference for area, price range, type, or star rating?
[A] In terms of type, I want a hotel. And I'd like 4 stars and wifi as well, with a location in the south
[B] There are two places that meet your search criteria. Did you have a price range in mind?
[A] Price doesn't matter. Do they have free parking?
[B] Yes as a matter of fact they do.
[A] Do they have free wifi also?
[B] Yes, both the establishments offer free internet as well.
[A] Give me the address and phone number for the one you most recommend
[B] Rosa's Bed and Breakfast is the one I recommend. It's address is 53 Roseford Road and it's phone number is 01223512596
[A] Do they offer free parking?
[B] Yes, they do offer free parking. Can I book a room for you?
[A] No thank you. I have all the info I need.
[B] Will you need a taxi to get to tandoori palace? I can help with that.
[A] No I am good! I do not need a taxi.
[B] Can I help you with anything else today?
[A] No I believe we have got everything done. Goodbye.
[B] Happy to help. Have a great day.

[A] I'm looking to book a particular hotel today. Could you help me?
[B] I sure can. We have 33 hotels and guesthouses to choose from. Is there anything specific you need from the hotel/guesthouse?
[A] I'm actually looking for Finches Bed and Breakfast. Is that on your list?
[B] Yes, the address is 144 thorton road and they can be reached at 01223276653. Anything else?
[A] Do they have free parking and what type of hotel is it?
[B] It is a guesthouse and it does have free parking. Would you like me to make a reservation for you?
[A] I'm also looking for attractions in center and free entrance.
[B] We have 25 attractions in the centre with free entry. Do you have a preference for what type of attraction you'd like to visit?
[A] Not really, pick the one you think would be best for a tourist.
[B] I would recommend the primavera museum, would you like more info?
[A] Is there an entrance fee?
[B] The entrance fee is free. Would you like me to look up anything else for you?
[A] Yes, I need to book a taxi to get between the two places.
[B] what time would you like to leave the finches bed and breakfast?
[A] Actually, I want to go from Primavera to the hotel, please.
[B] What time would you like to be picked up?
[A] I need to leave the attraction by 9:15.
[B] You will be picked up by a red ford. Your contact number is 07926020669. May I help with something else?
[A] That is all for now. Thank you so much for your help.
[B] Thank you for calling and have a fantastic trip to Cambridge! Goodbye.

[A] I am looking for information on the Scott Polar Museum.
[B] Scott Polar Museum is in the centre. Phone number is 01223336540. Postcode is cb21er, address is lensfield road and entrance fee is free. Anything else I can help you with today?
[A] No that is all. Thank you very much.
[B] My pleasure, thank you for using Cambridge TownInfo centre.
[A] Sorry, I had another concern. I'm looking for a train that goes to Cambridge and arrives by 17:15
[B] Where will you be departing from and do you have a particular day you wish to leave?
[A] I want to depart Wednesday from Norwich
[B] There are several options meeting your criteria. What time would you prefer to depart?
[A] It doesn't matter. I just need the travel time, departure time, and train ID.
[B] TR0033 is the latest train that meets your requirements and leaves norwich at 15:16. If you want to catch an earlier train, they depart hourly. Anything else I can do?
[A] That will be all for now.Thank you very much
[B] You are very welcome. Thank you for using the Cambridge Towninfo Centre! We appreciate your business, have a great a day.
[A] Thank you for your help!
[B] Have a great day.

[A] I need a place to stay in the east
[B] What pricerange are you looking for in your hotel?
[A] I would prefer a place in the moderate price range with 4 stars and free wifi.
[B] I have 3 results in the moderate price range. Do you need parking?
[A] No, I do not need parking. I would need you to book a place for 1 person who will be staying for three nights beginning Tuesday. Can you do that?
[B] Not a problem, would the A and B Guest House work for you?
[A] Yes, please book it. I need a reference number. I also need to book a train leaving after 13:15 on Tuesday.
[B] What days are you planning on staying and how many people will be staying?
[A] 1 person and 3 nights starting tuesday please.
[B] It's all booked, reference number is 22HE1KCU
[A] Thank you I also need a train leaving after 13:15 on tuesday
[B] There are 2828 trains can you tell me where you would be leaving from and your destination?
[A] The train should go to cambridge and should depart from broxbourne.
[B] The following train is available: TR8199 Broxbourne to Cambridge on Tuesday at 13:32 arriving at 14:32. This will cost 17.89GBP. Would you like to reserve this?
[A] Yes please. Just one ticket and could I get the reference number pleases?
[B] Yes, I was able to book the train for you. The reference number is 2DATSODP .
[A] Ok, great! Thanks for all of your help. That is all I needed for today.
[B] I am glad that I could help. Have a good day!

[A] I'm looking for a moderately priced restaurant in the west part of town.
[B] I found several restaurants meeting your criteria. Would you prefer indian, italian or british food?
[A] I have no preference. Can I get the phone number and address of one?
[B] meghna serves indian food, in the moderate price range and in the west part of town, its phone number is 01223 727410 and the address is 205 victoria road chesterton. is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] No, thank you. That is all I needed.
[B] thank you, goodbye

[A] I'm looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the expensive price range.
[B] Okay. Do you want to dine in a specific area?
[A] I am looking in the centre of town.
[B] We have 4 expensive italian restaurants in the center of town. Two are in Market Hill City Centre. Shall I just pick one for you?
[A] Yes, surprise me please! it's for 8 people at 16:30 on Tuesday.
[B] Booking was successful at don pasquale pizzeria. The table will be reserved for 15 minutes. Reference number is : OYESLS03 . Can I help with anything else?
[A] No, thank you so much! Have a nice day
[B] You are welcome. Have a nice day as well. Good bye.

[A] Can you help me find a train from kings lynn?
[B] the next train from kings lynn is Friday 5:11 to Cambridge
[A] Do you have any that would arrive at 17:45, leaving tuesday instead?
[B] Yes, there are 12 trains that fit that criteria. Do you have a desired departure time?
[A] Whatever gets me there as close to 17:45 as possible. Can you book it for 7 people please? Reference number and train ID would also be lovely.
[B] All booked! Your train ID is TR8177 and the reference number is ZDTM4B8N . You will be arriving at 16:58.
[A] Thank you. I'm also looking for places to go in town. can you help me with that?
[B] Sure, what are you interested in seeing?
[A] I am looking for some type of entertainment.
[B] There's the Funky Fun House on the east side of town, does that sound ok?
[A] That sounds great, may I have the postcode, phone number and area of town it is in?
[B] Funky fun house is located in the east side of town, address is 8 mercers row, mercers row industrial estate postcode cb58hy, phone 01223304705. Is there anything else needed?
[A] Thank you so much. That is all.
[B] You're quite welcome. Have a good day!

[A] I'm looking for a Chinese restaurant please. Or one that serves Chinese food.
[B] What area of town would you like the restaurant to be in?
[A] I'd like to be in the centre of town.
[B] Jinling noodle bar is in the centre area serving Chinese in the moderate price range. Would you like to reserve a table?
[A] I want something expensive.
[B] I think you would enjoy ugly duckling. Want more information?
[A] Could you make a reservation for 3 people at 15:15 on Saturday and provide the reference number? Also looking for a theatre in the same area.
[B] I made a reservation for your party of 3 at the Ugly duckling for Saturday at 15:15. Your reference is PEZ07FH7 . Is there anything else I can help you with?
